prompt: Reverse-engineer a spec for internal/orchestrator/supervisor.go — I want to understand what this supervisor actually does.

assertions.text: Spec accurately describes the behavior of both core functions: GetSupervisor and Generate
Spec flags suspicious behavior or noteworthy points using [NOTE] tags
Spec distinguishes between what the code actually does and what it might have intended to do
Spec includes dependency relationships (what it depends on / who depends on it)
Spec does not write any files to the project source directory
Spec describes the configuration priority chain
